requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency & Labelling — EAEU Energy-Efficiency Label for Household Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 能效与标识——EAEU家用电冰箱能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 能效與標識——EAEU家用電冰箱能效標籤

summary.en: Within the EAEU, energy-efficiency labelling for household refrigerating appliances follows the EAEU energy-efficiency labelling framework (Eurasian Economic Commission decisions on energy-efficiency requirements and the energy label for household appliances), which establishes an energy-efficiency class displayed on a colour-coded label and a corresponding Energy Efficiency Index (EEI) calculated from rated volume, compartment configuration, and a reference-consumption formula. The label shows the efficiency class, annual energy consumption (kWh/year), net volumes per compartment type, and noise level, broadly mirroring the GOST / IEC 62552 measurement basis. For appliances placed on the Armenian market, the energy-efficiency class must be determined per the EAEU methodology and the label affixed before sale. Measurement is performed to the GOST adoption of the IEC 62552 series (GOST IEC 62552 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods).
summary.zh: 在EAEU内，家用制冷器具的能效标识遵循EAEU能效标识框架（欧亚经济委员会关于家用器具能效要求及能效标签的决定），该框架规定了在彩色分级标签上展示的能效等级及相应的能效指数（EEI），后者根据额定容积、隔间配置及参考耗电量公式计算所得。标签展示能效等级、年耗电量（千瓦时/年）、各类隔间净容积及噪声值，整体上参照GOST/IEC 62552测量基准。对于投放亚美尼亚市场的器具，须按EAEU方法确定能效等级并在销售前加贴标签。测量依据IEC 62552系列的GOST转化版（GOST IEC 62552——家用制冷器具——特性和试验方法）进行。
summary.zht: 在EAEU內，家用製冷器具的能效標識遵循EAEU能效標識框架（歐亞經濟委員會關於家用器具能效要求及能效標籤的決定），該框架規定了在彩色分級標籤上展示的能效等級及相應的能效指數（EEI），後者根據額定容積、隔間配置及參考耗電量公式計算所得。標籤展示能效等級、年耗電量（千瓦時/年）、各類隔間淨容積及噪聲值，整體上參照GOST/IEC 62552測量基準。對於投放亞美尼亞市場的器具，須按EAEU方法確定能效等級並在銷售前加貼標籤。測量依據IEC 62552系列的GOST轉化版（GOST IEC 62552——家用製冷器具——特性和試驗方法）進行。

standards_or_laws: EAEU energy-efficiency labelling framework — Eurasian Economic Commission decisions on energy-efficiency requirements and the energy label for household appliances (refrigerating appliances in scope)
GOST IEC 62552 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (interstate adoption of the IEC 62552 series; measurement basis)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which establishes energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits. The standard is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label (CEL) administered by NDRC and based on GB 12021.2; products must display the CEL before sale. The GB 12021.2 grade framework uses a 1-to-5 scale and a different EEI calculation basis than the EAEU energy-efficiency class methodology — Chinese grades and EAEU classes are not directly comparable without recalculation.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识（CEL）由NDRC管理并基于GB 12021.2；产品在销售前须展示CEL。GB 12021.2等级框架采用1至5级评级，其EEI计算基准与EAEU能效等级方法不同——中国等级与EAEU等级未经重新计算不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識（CEL）由NDRC管理並基於GB 12021.2；產品在銷售前須展示CEL。GB 12021.2等級框架採用1至5級評級，其EEI計算基準與EAEU能效等級方法不同——中國等級與EAEU等級未經重新計算不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two gaps exist between Chinese energy compliance and EAEU requirements: (1) Different EEI / class basis — the EAEU energy-efficiency class is derived from an EEI formula based on rated volume and compartment type, whereas GB 12021.2-2015 uses a 1-to-5 grade framework; a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not guarantee a given EAEU class without independent recalculation to the EAEU methodology. (2) Label format — the EAEU energy-efficiency label (with its class scale, kWh/year, net volumes, and noise) differs from the China Energy Label and must be produced for the Armenian market; the CEL cannot serve as the EAEU label. Measurement to the GOST IEC 62552 series is required to substantiate the EAEU class, though China's GB/T 8059 measurement aligns with the same IEC 62552 base, which can ease re-testing.
gap.zh: 中国能效合规与EAEU要求之间存在两项差距：（1）EEI/等级基准不同——EAEU能效等级源自基于额定容积和隔间类型的EEI公式，而GB 12021.2-2015采用1至5级框架；中国1级或2级评定不等同于某一EAEU等级，须按EAEU方法独立重新计算。（2）标签格式——EAEU能效标签（含等级标尺、千瓦时/年、净容积及噪声）与中国能效标识不同，须为亚美尼亚市场制作；CEL不能充当EAEU标签。须依据GOST IEC 62552系列测量以佐证EAEU等级，不过中国GB/T 8059测量与同一IEC 62552基础一致，可减轻重新检测负担。
gap.zht: 中國能效合規與EAEU要求之間存在兩項差距：（1）EEI/等級基準不同——EAEU能效等級源自基於額定容積和隔間類型的EEI公式，而GB 12021.2-2015採用1至5級框架；中國1級或2級評定不等同於某一EAEU等級，須按EAEU方法獨立重新計算。（2）標籤格式——EAEU能效標籤（含等級標尺、千瓦時/年、淨容積及噪聲）與中國能效標識不同，須為亞美尼亞市場製作；CEL不能充當EAEU標籤。須依據GOST IEC 62552系列測量以佐證EAEU等級，不過中國GB/T 8059測量與同一IEC 62552基礎一致，可減輕重新檢測負擔。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAEU energy-efficiency class determination and energy-label display are required before sale of household refrigerators on the Armenian / EAEU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The EAEU energy-efficiency class and label are mandatory for household refrigerators in Armenia. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not substitute for the EAEU class — independent recalculation to the EAEU methodology (with GOST IEC 62552 measurement) and an EAEU-format energy label are required. China's IEC 62552-aligned test data can ease re-testing but does not replace the EAEU class determination.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EAEU能效等级及标签是家用电冰箱在亚美尼亚的强制要求。中国GB 12021.2等级不能替代EAEU等级——须按EAEU方法独立重新计算（配合GOST IEC 62552测量）并制作EAEU格式能效标签。中国与IEC 62552一致的检测数据可减轻重新检测负担，但不能替代EAEU等级判定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EAEU能效等級及標籤是家用電冰箱在亞美尼亞的強制要求。中國GB 12021.2等級不能替代EAEU等級——須按EAEU方法獨立重新計算（配合GOST IEC 62552測量）並製作EAEU格式能效標籤。中國與IEC 62552一致的檢測數據可減輕重新檢測負擔，但不能替代EAEU等級判定。

summary.en: Technical Regulation TR EAEU 037/2016 (On restriction of the use of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products) is the EAEU's RoHS-style regulation. It restricts the content of lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, polybrominated biphenyls (PBB), and polybrominated diphenyl ethers (PBDE) in electrical and electronic products — including household refrigerating appliances — to defined maximum concentration values by homogeneous material. Conformity is demonstrated by a declaration of conformity registered with an EAEU-accredited body, and the product carries the single EAC conformity mark covering TR EAEU 037/2016 (often alongside TR CU 004 and TR CU 020). Technical documentation must substantiate the restricted-substance content, typically through supplier declarations, material analysis, or test reports.
summary.zh: 技术法规TR EAEU 037/2016（电气电子产品中有害物质使用限制）是EAEU的RoHS式法规。它将电气电子产品（包括家用制冷器具）中铅、汞、镉、六价铬、多溴联苯（PBB）及多溴二苯醚（PBDE）的含量限制在按均质材料界定的最大浓度值之内。合格性通过向EAEU认可机构登记的合格声明予以证明，产品加贴涵盖TR EAEU 037/2016的统一EAC合格标志（通常与TR CU 004及TR CU 020一并）。技术文件须佐证受限物质含量，通常通过供应商声明、材料分析或检测报告。
summary.zht: 技術法規TR EAEU 037/2016（電氣電子產品中有害物質使用限制）是EAEU的RoHS式法規。它將電氣電子產品（包括家用製冷器具）中鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、多溴聯苯（PBB）及多溴二苯醚（PBDE）的含量限制在按均質材料界定的最大濃度值之內。合格性通過向EAEU認可機構登記的合格聲明予以證明，產品加貼涵蓋TR EAEU 037/2016的統一EAC合格標誌（通常與TR CU 004及TR CU 020一併）。技術文件須佐證受限物質含量，通常通過供應商聲明、材料分析或檢測報告。

standards_or_laws: TR EAEU 037/2016 — Technical Regulation On restriction of the use of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products (EAEU; EAC mark; RoHS-style)
GOST IEC 62321 series — Determination of certain substances in electrotechnical products (interstate adoption; substantiates restricted-substance content)

summary.en: China's RoHS-style regime is the Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (China RoHS 2, MIIT et al., in force 2016), supported by GB/T 26572-2011 (limit requirements for restricted substances) and the GB/T 39560 series (IEC 62321 equivalent test methods). It restricts the same six substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) and requires marking (the orange e-Environmental Protection Use Period logo and a substance table) plus, for products in the State Compliance Management Catalogue, conformity assessment. While the restricted-substance lists and limits broadly align with TR EAEU 037/2016, the conformity-assessment, marking, and declaration mechanisms differ.
summary.zh: 中国的RoHS式制度为《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》（中国RoHS 2，工信部等，2016年施行），辅以GB/T 26572-2011（限用物质的限量要求）及GB/T 39560系列（等同IEC 62321的检测方法）。它限制相同的六种物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），要求标识（橙色环保使用期限标志及物质表），并对列入合格评定管理目录的产品要求合格评定。虽然受限物质清单和限值与TR EAEU 037/2016大体一致，但合格评定、标识及声明机制不同。
summary.zht: 中國的RoHS式制度為《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》（中國RoHS 2，工信部等，2016年施行），輔以GB/T 26572-2011（限用物質的限量要求）及GB/T 39560系列（等同IEC 62321的檢測方法）。它限制相同的六種物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），要求標識（橙色環保使用期限標誌及物質表），並對列入合格評定管理目錄的產品要求合格評定。雖然受限物質清單和限值與TR EAEU 037/2016大體一致，但合格評定、標識及聲明機制不同。

standards_or_laws: Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (China RoHS 2, MIIT et al., 2016)
GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements of concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products
GB/T 39560 series — Determination of certain substances in electrotechnical products (equivalent to IEC 62321 series)

gap.en: The substance lists and concentration limits are broadly comparable, so the main gap is procedural: (1) Separate declaration — TR EAEU 037/2016 requires a declaration of conformity registered with an EAEU-accredited body and the EAC mark; China RoHS 2 marking and any China conformity assessment do not satisfy this and cannot be relied on as evidence. (2) Documentation — the EAEU technical file must substantiate restricted-substance content (supplier declarations, GOST IEC 62321 / IEC 62321 test reports, BOM), in Russian, to support the registered declaration. (3) Bundled EAC — TR EAEU 037/2016 conformity is typically combined with TR CU 004 and TR CU 020 under one EAC marking, so the substance evidence must be assembled together with the safety and EMC package for the same applicant/importer.
gap.zh: 物质清单和浓度限值大体可比，因此主要差距是程序性的：（1）独立声明——TR EAEU 037/2016要求向EAEU认可机构登记合格声明并加贴EAC标志；中国RoHS 2标识及任何中国合格评定不满足此要求，亦不能作为证据依赖。（2）文件——EAEU技术文件须佐证受限物质含量（供应商声明、GOST IEC 62321/IEC 62321检测报告、物料清单），并以俄语呈现，以支撑登记的声明。（3）EAC一并——TR EAEU 037/2016合格通常与TR CU 004及TR CU 020合并于单一EAC标志下，因此物质证据须与安全和电磁兼容文件包一并、按同一申请人/进口商组织。
gap.zht: 物質清單和濃度限值大體可比，因此主要差距是程序性的：（1）獨立聲明——TR EAEU 037/2016要求向EAEU認可機構登記合格聲明並加貼EAC標誌；中國RoHS 2標識及任何中國合格評定不滿足此要求，亦不能作為證據依賴。（2）文件——EAEU技術文件須佐證受限物質含量（供應商聲明、GOST IEC 62321/IEC 62321檢測報告、物料清單），並以俄語呈現，以支撐登記的聲明。（3）EAC一併——TR EAEU 037/2016合格通常與TR CU 004及TR CU 020合併於單一EAC標誌下，因此物質證據須與安全和電磁相容文件包一併、按同一申請人/進口商組織。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TR EAEU 037/2016 declaration of conformity and EAC marking are required for electrical and electronic products, including household refrigerators, before placement on the Armenian / EAEU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory marking under China RoHS 2; conformity assessment mandatory only for products listed in the State Compliance Management Catalogue; administered by MIIT et al.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TR EAEU 037/2016 (RoHS-style) requires a registered declaration of conformity and EAC marking for household refrigerators in Armenia. China RoHS 2 marking does not substitute. The restricted-substance limits are broadly comparable, so the work is largely documentary — assembling GOST IEC 62321-backed evidence in Russian and bundling it with the TR CU 004 / TR CU 020 EAC package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TR EAEU 037/2016（RoHS式）要求家用电冰箱在亚美尼亚登记合格声明并加贴EAC标志。中国RoHS 2标识不能替代。受限物质限值大体可比，因此工作主要是文件性的——以俄语整理有GOST IEC 62321支撑的证据，并与TR CU 004/TR CU 020 EAC文件包一并提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TR EAEU 037/2016（RoHS式）要求家用電冰箱在亞美尼亞登記合格聲明並加貼EAC標誌。中國RoHS 2標識不能替代。受限物質限值大體可比，因此工作主要是文件性的——以俄語整理有GOST IEC 62321支撐的證據，並與TR CU 004/TR CU 020 EAC文件包一併提交。
